column2: # Nature Journal Style Transcript Analysis Plots
# Check available fonts and use appropriate one
plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 5, b = 5, l = 5, unit = "pt")
# Filter out transcripts not detected at any level
# Subset full-length and unique counts to these filtered tx
rm(cdna_tx, drna_tx, cdna_fl, drna_fl, cdna_uni, drna_uni)
rm(cdna_low, cdna_med, cdna_high, drna_low, drna_med, drna_high)
ggplot(aes(x = Protocol, y = Number_of_Transcripts, fill = Confidence)) +
legend.margin = margin(t = 2, r = 4, b = 2, l = 4, unit = "pt"))
